Partner with Us!

Own a TrueKnack Franchise

Partner with India's premier retail banking institute and build a high-returns educational business in your city.

The Progressive Franchise Model

Leverage our proven systems, strong placements, and regional credibility to build a business that grows steadily and scales confidently.

Hiring Partners

About TrueKnack

Since 2022, TrueKnack has been on a simple mission to bridge the skill gap between graduates and the banking industry. What started as a dedicated training initiative has today become a trusted professional retail banking training institute in Maharashtra, known for quality, consistency, and placement outcomes.

TrueKnack is an NSDC Authorized Training Partner, reinforcing our credibility and quality standards at a regional level. Our students today work as Personal Bankers, Relationship Managers, Tellers, KYC/AML Officers, and Wealth Managers across India's most respected private sector banks.

Target Franchise Cities

We are actively expanding our footprints in 3 high-demand cities in Maharashtra:

  • Pune High Demand
  • Nagpur Commercial Hub
  • Sambhajinagar Academic Hub

Why Invest in a TrueKnack Franchise?

Join a mission-driven education brand that delivers consistent results, transforms careers, and ensures stable returns year after year.

Established Brand & Trust

Leverage the trust of a premier institute with over 6,000+ placements and years of experience in retail banking training.

Strong Placement Network

TrueKnack has centralized tie-ups with leading private banks and retail NBFCs, managing student interviews directly.

Affordable Setup & High ROI

Low setup cost, low operational cost, and high local student demand ensure sustainable monthly profitability.

Industry-Crafted Curriculum

Programs designed by veteran ex-bankers, keeping graduates updated with latest retail branch systems.

Who Is This Franchise Perfect For?

The TrueKnack franchise is designed for individuals who want a stable, high-impact business with long-term growth potential.

Ex-Bankers

Leverage your domain knowledge and professional network to guide the next generation of retail bankers.

Investors

Seek a reliable, scalable business model with a low entry barrier and a strong potential for monthly ROI.

Educationists

Expand your academic portfolio and diversify your service offerings with professional job-linked programs.

Existing Owners

Diversify your current business with a training brand that has direct hiring tie-ups across the banking sector.

Entrepreneurs

Build a business with a purpose, focusing on skill development, youth employment, and stable career paths.

If you enjoy mentoring, business building, and contributing to youth employment, this is tailor-made for you!

Franchise Requirements

Transparent requirements for a successful and mutually beneficial partnership.

Space Required

  • Area: 500 – 700 sq ft
  • Centre Head Room: 1
  • Meeting Room: 1
  • Workstations: 3
  • Pantry & Washroom

Investment & ROI

  • License Fee: Rs. 5,00,000 + GST
  • Setup Cost: As per actuals
  • Term of Contract: 3 years
  • Expected ROI: ₹ 2-5 Lakhs/Month
  • Includes Promotional Kit

Manpower

  • Centre Sales Head: 1
  • Education Counsellors: 5
  • Marketing Executive: 1
  • Office Support Staff: 1

What TrueKnack Provides to Partners

We stay with you throughout the journey to ensure operational and marketing success.

Before Launch

  • ✓ Assistance in site selection & design layout
  • ✓ Intensive training of centre sales heads & counsellors
  • ✓ Pre-launch localized marketing campaigns
  • ✓ Setup support & corporate identity compliance

After Launch

  • ✓ Continuous digital lead generation support
  • ✓ Access to TrueKnack LMS & CRM portals
  • ✓ Ongoing ex-banker faculty delivery (online mode)
  • ✓ Centralized placement support & recruiters drive

How to Own a TrueKnack Franchise

Our onboarding process is transparent, structured, and supportive at every stage.

1

Initial Inquiry

Submit your interest by filling out the online franchise inquiry form.

2

Discussion

Our business expansion team connects for a detailed conversation.

3

Application Review

We review your location viability, capital, and business experience.

4

Approval & Agreement

Submit franchise fees and sign the official partner agreement.

5

Center Setup

Design, setup, and branding implementation under our guidelines.

6

Staff Induction

Extensive training for counselors and center heads before launch.

7

Inauguration

Your center launches admissions with continuous team mentoring.

What Our Existing Franchise Partners Say

Hear directly from the partners who have established successful training centers with TrueKnack.

"Partnering with TrueKnack has been an extremely rewarding business decision. The student demand for retail banking training in Maharashtra is massive. The support from the head office in placement tie-ups and faculty delivery is exceptional, which ensures our students get placed in top banks quickly."

SD
Sachin Deshmukh
Pune Franchise Partner

"TrueKnack's brand credibility and NSDC partnership make it easy to win the trust of local graduates. The operational blueprint and marketing support they provided during our launch made setting up the center seamless. We've hit operational profitability in our first year."

PK
Priya Kulkarni
Nagpur Franchise Partner

Want to Discuss Further?

Have questions about territory exclusivity, fee split, or launch timelines? Reach out to our Franchise Development Team directly to get all your questions answered.

Call: +91 91721 55613
